title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Flat editorial technical infographic on deep navy background with warm terracotta and gold accents and subtle paper texture. Left: a YAML document icon labeled 'pipeline_defs/animated-explainer.yaml'. A horizontal flow of eight rounded stage boxes: research -> proposal -> script -> scene_plan -> assets -> edit -> compose -> publish. Each stage has a small JSON checkpoint badge labeled 'checkpoint.json' with status indicators: pending, in_progress, completed, failed, needs_review. Below the flow: a 'human approval' gate and a 'pre-compose validation' shield. Clean arrows, readable labels, no extra text, no UI controls, vector style.
